Declare an outcome through portable C4 contracts. The Metacloud identifies and activates the most suitable implementation.

Everything you need to know about the Elemento Metacloud.

Elemento is the Metacloud: a sovereign control plane that abstracts infrastructure providers — public clouds, hypervisors, sovereign providers and native AtomOS — through Electros, C4, Atomosphere and Atomosquare. Unlike a single cloud or hypervisor vendor, Elemento federates what already exists without forcing replatforming.

Customers typically save 60-80% on cloud costs through intelligent workload placement, real-time pricing optimization, and the ability to run workloads on your own hardware. Elemento enables real-time arbitrage across cloud providers and can automatically move workloads to the most cost-effective infrastructure while maintaining performance and reliability.

Elemento provides bank-grade security with end-to-end encryption, compliance-ready architecture, and the ability to run in your own data center for maximum control. We support SOC 2, GDPR, and industry-specific compliance requirements. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest, with optional customer-managed encryption keys. Learn more about our security and compliance features .

Yes! Elemento supports migration from existing cloud providers and on-premises infrastructure. Our platform is compatible with standard virtualization technologies and container platforms. We provide migration tools and support to help you move workloads with minimal downtime. Most applications require no code changes.

We provide comprehensive documentation, video tutorials, and a knowledge base. Enterprise customers get dedicated support with SLAs, while community users can access our active community forum and GitHub repositories. We also offer training programs and workshops for teams.

Elemento offers a generous free tier that includes up to 2 VMs on AtomOS, basic Electros features, and access to Atomosphere API. This is perfect for testing, development, and small projects. You can upgrade to paid plans anytime for additional features, support, and higher usage limits.

Yes! Elemento fully supports Kubernetes and container workloads. You can deploy and manage Kubernetes clusters across any cloud provider, and our platform provides additional orchestration capabilities on top of Kubernetes. We also support Docker containers, Helm charts, and other container-native tools.

Elemento supports 235+ data centers worldwide across all major cloud providers. This includes AWS regions, Azure regions, Google Cloud regions, and numerous edge locations. You can deploy workloads in any region and easily move them between regions for optimal performance and compliance. Explore our deployment options and global infrastructure .

Every cloud solved infrastructure. None solved dependency. Organisations now need the freedom to govern, move and procure infrastructure independently from any single provider. The Metacloud is the missing layer.
The Broadcom acquisition exposed the cost and risk of single-vendor infrastructure dependency. Organisations own workloads, but not always their freedom to move them.
NIS2, DORA, the EU Data Act and the EU AI Act are making infrastructure jurisdiction, data residency and operational control board-level concerns.
AI workloads require access to GPUs, specialised infrastructure, sovereign environments and multiple providers. No single provider delivers it all.
One control plane. Two connector fabrics. One native sovereign execution layer.

Govern, orchestrate and optimise infrastructure across public clouds, private clouds, sovereign providers, hypervisors and native AtomOS environments — through one sovereign control plane. The Internet connected networks. Cloud connected computing. The Metacloud connects infrastructure.

Our patented C4 Protocol (patented in Italy, patent pending worldwide) is a standardized protocol that enables cloud service providers to integrate seamlessly with enterprise-grade multi-cloud management platforms. This revolutionary technology simplifies cloud provider integration and expands market reach. The Elemento Cloud Network book on BookStack hosts the C4 whitepaper, connector specification, and Meson tech pack for mapping existing provider APIs into C4-shaped services. Learn about our product ecosystem and technical insights .
Patented technology enabling standardized multi-cloud integration and resource management across any cloud provider.

The central management layer that orchestrates all platform operations, including Kubernetes control plane, API gateway, and management interfaces. Documentation describes this as the Elemento Cloud Network gateway that links existing clouds into a single operational model.

en: Ready for Cross-Provider DR?
Yes. Electros coordinates primary, DR, and fallback environments across providers with unified RPO and RTO governance.
Can DR span multiple Cloud providers?
You define recovery policies per workload including jurisdiction and residency. Failover respects those constraints across connected providers.
How do sovereign recovery targets work?
Atomosquare and AtomOS enable on-premises fallback as part of your DR topology, not just another Cloud region.
Can on-premises be a DR target?
Elemento coordinates recovery orchestration and governance. It complements your backup and replication tooling by providing provider-independent failover control.

en: Ready for Data Repatriation?
Yes. Elemento treats repatriation as a policy and placement decision. Workloads move between providers while governance and operational models stay consistent.
Can we repatriate without re-architecting applications?
Atomosphere orchestrates placement across regions and providers. Electros enforces residency and jurisdiction policies throughout the migration.
How do we move workloads from US to EU providers?
Atomosquare and AtomOS provide the on-premises target. Migration preserves governance rather than requiring a new operational stack.
Can we move from public Cloud back to on-premises?
Regulatory changes, geopolitical shifts, cost optimisation, or internal sovereignty policies. Elemento lets you react with a plan instead of a re-engineering project.
What triggers a repatriation plan?

en: Ready for VMware Exit?
No. Elemento is designed for side-by-side operation. Govern VMware and AtomOS together, then migrate workload by workload at your own pace.
Do we need a forklift migration from VMware?
Atomosquare connects VMware and other third-party hypervisors to Electros so you apply the same policies, monitoring, and access controls across all environments.
How does Atomosquare help during VMware exit?
You keep running VMware where needed while gradually shifting execution to AtomOS. No forced rip-and-replace timeline.
What happens to existing VMware investments during transition?
Electros provides an organisation-wide control plane that is not tied to a single hypervisor or cloud. You gain portability instead of trading one lock-in for another.
How is this different from switching to another proprietary hypervisor?

Learn about Elemento's mission to transform cloud infrastructure with vendor-neutral, cost-effective, and green computing solutions.
it: Scopri la missione di Elemento di trasformare l'infrastruttura cloud con soluzioni informatiche indipendenti dai fornitori, convenienti ed ecologiche.
fr: Découvrez la mission d'Elemento qui consiste à transformer l'infrastructure cloud avec des solutions informatiques indépendantes du fournisseur, rentables et écologiques.

en: Transforming cloud infrastructure with vendor-neutral, cost-effective, and sustainable computing.
it: Trasformiamo l'infrastruttura cloud con soluzioni indipendenti dal fornitore, sostenibili e convenienti.
fr: Transformer l'infrastructure cloud avec des solutions neutres, durables et économiques.

en: Get in touch with Elemento for cloud infrastructure solutions, support, sales inquiries, or partnership opportunities.
it: Mettiti in contatto con Elemento per soluzioni di infrastruttura cloud, supporto, richieste di vendita o opportunità di partnership.
fr: Contactez Elemento pour des solutions d'infrastructure cloud, une assistance, des demandes commerciales ou des opportunités de partenariat.

en: We're here to help with sales, support, and partnerships.
it: Siamo qui per vendite, supporto e partnership.
fr: Nous sommes là pour vous aider avec les ventes, le support et les partenariats.

fr: Elemento | Contacter | Obtenez de l'assistance pour votre plateforme cloud

en: Elemento is the Metacloud: a sovereign control plane to govern, orchestrate and optimise public clouds, private clouds, hypervisors, sovereign providers and native AtomOS infrastructure.
it: Elemento è una piattaforma cloud indipendente dal fornitore, economica, ecologica, ad alte prestazioni e auto-ospitabili con predisposizione per l'infrastruttura come codice.
fr: Elemento est une plate-forme cloud indépendante du fournisseur, économique, écologique, hautes performances et auto-hébergable avec une préparation à l'infrastructure en tant que code.

en: The Infrastructure Layer After Cloud.
it: Cloud indipendente dal fornitore, conveniente, sostenibile, ad alte prestazioni e auto-ospitabile, pronto per l'infrastructure as code.
fr: Cloud neutre, économique, durable, performant et auto-hébergeable, prêt pour l'infrastructure as code.

en: Explore Elemento's modular cloud products: AtomOS hypervisor, Electros orchestration, and Atomosphere API layer.
it: Esplora i prodotti completi della piattaforma cloud di Elemento, tra cui l'hypervisor AtomOS, il dashboard di orchestrazione Electros e il proxy API Atomosphere per la gestione unificata dell'infrastruttura.
fr: Explorez les produits complets de plate-forme cloud d'Elemento, notamment l'hyperviseur AtomOS, le tableau de bord d'orchestration Electros et le proxy API Atomosphere pour une gestion unifiée de l'infrastructure.

en: Modular building blocks for a unified multi-cloud platform.
